parameters.query: SELECT id FROM vmm_complaintstores WHERE storecode='{{ $('Prepare Data2').first().json.storeCode }}' AND empcode='{{ $('Prepare Data2').first().json.empCode }}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM vmm_complaints WHERE storerefid={{ $('Build Complaint INSERT2').first().json.storeRefId }} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
UPDATE vmm_referenceno SET lastno = lastno + 1 WHERE id = 1
SELECT lastno FROM vmm_referenceno WHERE id = 1
SELECT id FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid={{ $('Generate Complaint No2').first().json.complaintId }} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
